meta.title: DEF CON 29 Car Hacking Village - Don Hatfield - Build Automotive Gateways with Ease
meta.description: Vehicle network architectures within modern vehicles have been transformed by the introduction of automotive gateways. These gateways enable seamless communication between different vehicle networks and are central to the success of modern architectures. In this presentation, we are going to cover some of the challenges that automotive engineers face when tasked with converting data between old and new network protocols. We’ll also detail how this process is made much easier.
